TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Lucius Oliver Allen , Jr ga semong ppzuy mari lalu' niya' balay, 26 ryax 9 byacing 1947 kawas qu hintgan nya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq ru 79 kunkin kin'suw nya. ppzuy nya mari ga kmahang mari te suruw, tmasuq mqwas squ UCLA. Kawas te 1969, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics (maki' squ te qutux hinguwi ran na pinwzyagan na' lga maki' te cyugal binkgan lalu' niya') ryax pizyuwi'an niya' mari' ga mnaki' sa Seattle SuperSonics, Milwaukee Bucks, Los Angeles Lakers ru Sacramento Kings. kinbleqan pinzyuwi'an niya mari kawas te 9407 ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya pspung ga 13.4), kawas te 2205 qnol niya zikna tkran ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya pspung ga 3.1), kawas te 3174 rnaw nya ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya msspung ga 4.5) kinmuci' na minkirok mnagal Champion na NBA, mnagal Champion na NCAA sa kawas te (1967.1968) bniru' nha' ryax qnxan niya Kawas te 1969 ga mzyup kya NBA, 'aring kya squ ppzyuwi'an niya' mari' la. Kawas te 1971, pragan nha' squ rogak niya' sa raygak rmaw squ gluw na Milwaukee Bucks magal sa Champion na NBA. Kawas te 1979, spquzi' niyya' wagiq qu pinlukus niya niwan tmasuq kya pinzi'an niya pinzyuwi'an mari la. kawas te 1999, galan spzyang blaq balay sensyu mzyuwi' mari' na kocyu sa State of Kansas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lu ¶~ ®ius~…ē oli*er allen , *r …£a s~…ēemoŇč ppzuj mari lalu Ē nija Ē ő≤alaj, ** rjax * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč **** kawas~…ē qu ńßint…£an nja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq ru ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja. ppzuj nja mari …£a kmańßaŇč mari te s~…ēuruw, tmas~…ēuq mqwas~…ē s~…ēqu u ¶~ ®la. kawas~…ē te ****, …£alun nqu s~…ēeattle s~…ēupers~…ēoni ¶~ ®s~…ē (maki Ē s~…ēqu te qutux ńßiŇčuwi ran na pinwzja…£an na Ē l…£a maki Ē te ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ink…£an lalu Ē nija Ē) rjax pizjuwi Ēan nija Ē mari Ē …£a mnaki Ē s~…ēa s~…ēeattle s~…ēupers~…ēoni ¶~ ®s~…ē, milwaukee ő≤u ¶~ ®ks~…ē, los~…ē aŇčeles~…ē lakers~…ē ru s~…ēa ¶~ ®ramento kiŇčs~…ē. kinő≤leqan pinzjuwi Ēan nija mari kawas~…ē te **** …£a (ptnaqun ps~…ēpuŇč kwara Ē inxalan nija ps~…ēpuŇč …£a **.*), kawas~…ē te **** qnol nija zikna tkran …£a (ptnaqun ps~…ēpuŇč kwara Ē inxalan nija ps~…ēpuŇč …£a *.*), kawas~…ē te **** rnaw nja …£a (ptnaqun ps~…ēpuŇč kwara Ē inxalan nija ms~…ēs~…ēpuŇč …£a *.*) kinmu ¶~ ®i Ē na minkirok mna…£al ¶~ ®ńßampion na nő≤a, mna…£al ¶~ ®ńßampion na n ¶~ ®aa s~…ēa kawas~…ē te (****.****) ő≤niru Ē nńßa Ē rjax qnxan nija kawas~…ē te **** …£a mzjup kja nő≤a, ĒariŇč kja s~…ēqu ppzjuwi Ēan nija Ē mari Ē la. kawas~…ē te ****, pra…£an nńßa Ē s~…ēqu ro…£ak nija Ē s~…ēa raj…£ak rmaw s~…ēqu …£luw na milwaukee ő≤u ¶~ ®ks~…ē ma…£al s~…ēa ¶~ ®ńßampion na nő≤a. kawas~…ē te ****, s~…ēpquzi Ē nijja Ē wa…£iq qu pinlukus~…ē nija niwan tmas~…ēuq kja pinzi Ēan nija pinzjuwi Ēan mari la. kawas~…ē te ****, …£alan s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq ő≤alaj s~…ēens~…ēju mzjuwi Ē mari Ē na ko ¶~ ®ju s~…ēa s~…ētate o* kans~…ēas~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Lucius Oliver Allen , Jr ga semong ppzuy mari lalu' niya' balay, 26 ryax 9 byacing 1947 kawas qu hintgan nya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq ru 79 kunkin kin'suw nya. ppzuy nya mari ga kmahang mari te suruw, tmasuq mqwas squ UCLA. Kawas te 1969, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics (maki' squ te qutux hinguwi ran na pinwzyagan na' lga maki' te cyugal binkgan lalu' niya') ryax pizyuwi'an niya' mari' ga mnaki' sa Seattle SuperSonics, Milwaukee Bucks, Los Angeles Lakers ru Sacramento Kings. kinbleqan pinzyuwi'an niya mari kawas te 9407 ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya pspung ga 13.4), kawas te 2205 qnol niya zikna tkran ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya pspung ga 3.1), kawas te 3174 rnaw nya ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya msspung ga 4.5) kinmuci' na minkirok mnagal Champion na NBA, mnagal Champion na NCAA sa kawas te (1967.1968) bniru' nha' ryax qnxan niya Kawas te 1969 ga mzyup kya NBA, 'aring kya squ ppzyuwi'an niya' mari' la. Kawas te 1971, pragan nha' squ rogak niya' sa raygak rmaw squ gluw na Milwaukee Bucks magal sa Champion na NBA. Kawas te 1979, spquzi' niyya' wagiq qu pinlukus niya niwan tmasuq kya pinzi'an niya pinzyuwi'an mari la. kawas te 1999, galan spzyang blaq balay sensyu mzyuwi' mari' na kocyu sa State of Kansas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
